props.name: as
props.description: Component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.

props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the component.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Sets if the color of text should be colored for a light or dark background.

props.name: container
props.description: Defines optional container wrapping children elements.

props.name: expand
props.description: Defines the responsive breakpoint to determine when content collapses.
